description: Canceling items, changing shipping addresses or delivery speeds on open orders, and archiving orders.
Adding, deleting, and editing default or secondary shipping addresses in the address book.
Viewing, printing, and downloading official billing invoices or tax receipts.
Taking customer satisfaction surveys and managing automated machine translation preferences in chat.
Password resets, Two-Step Verification (2SV/MFA), login recovery, and login troubleshooting.
Teen logins, household settings, and teen order approvals.
Shopping profiles, mobile device accounts, switching profiles, and signing out of devices.
Language preferences, marketing unsubscribe, third-party app access, and order archives.
Closing account requests and consequences.
Adding/editing cards in the wallet, backup payment settings, default payments, and gift card balances.
Currency of preference, exchange rates, and select card currencies.
Resolving declined checkout payments.
Tracking down unrecognized charges on credit card/bank statements.
Payment scams, general security guidelines, scam trends, and reporting scams.
Return windows, item eligibility policies, return requests, and pharmacy/luxury/business return rules.
Return restocking fees and damage deductions.
Return policies for international purchases.
Tracking return shipments, refund status timelines, and refund methods.
Checking promotional credit and benefit balances.
Package tracking links, map tracking, and photo delivery confirmations.
SMS/push notification tracking settings and text alerts.
Handling late deliveries, carrier delays, and missing scans/tracking numbers.
Package returned to sender as undeliverable.
Secure OTP delivery instructions, delivery windows, and prison delivery rules.
Standard customer support phone numbers, help chat, support tickets, fax requests, and currency help.
Deceased account closure processes and documentation guidelines.
Submitting Power of Attorney (POA) documentation.
Handling packages marked as delivered but not received, check carrier contact info.
Handling items/parts missing from a package, empty boxes, or missing packing slips.
Customs clearance requirements, uploading identity documents, South Korea PCCC codes, Taiwan EZ WAY, and Argentina CUIL.
Shipping to hotels, freight forwarders/third-party companies, signature requirements on delivery, packaging programs (Frustration-Free), and Fulfilled by Amazon (FBA) terms.
Recognizing fake emails, phone calls, SMS text messages, and websites, and reporting suspicious communications.
How US state sales tax calculations work, estimated tax at checkout, and international VAT rates.
Managing email preferences, newsletter updates, and out-of-stock restock email alerts.
